name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you have the ability of an alive neighbor (you don't know which).
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.1)
firstNightReminder: Swap their character token to that of one of their alive neighbors'. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: Swap their character token to that of one of their alive neighbors'. :reminder:
